examples.text: to Panama disease-resistant Cavendish bananas in the early 1960s. Today, bananas are no longer as economically vital in Central America, and United Fruit Company, rechristened Chiquita, has lost its stranglehold on Latin American politics. But the modern banana industry isn’t without problems.
examples.explanation: 这里的 rechristened Chiquita 表示“被重新命名为奇基塔（Chiquita）”。其中 rechristened 是过去分词，作插入成分，补充说明 United Fruit Company 后来改了名字。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
